en: This was such a good idea getting Catwoman a cat. Yeah, that's a perfect gift classic. It's like classic truly classic
ko: 캣우먼한테 고양이 선물하는 거 진짜 좋은 아이디어였어.

en: Oh cute cat Zoe's here to see you. Oh, yeah center on in. Hey Zoe there. I'm ready for you. Okay, great. Thanks
Hey guys What we lost the cat
Shut it, shut it, close it! Close the door!
Get anything small and cat like run by your legs out the door. Wait, what?
ko: 작고 고양이처럼 생긴 게 네 다리 사이로 문밖으로 뛰어나간 거 없어?

en: Wait, what? Is that all you can say? Help us find your gift. Why did you buy me a cat?
We thought it would be funny to get Catwoman a woman cat. It's classic. It's like our thing, okay?
ko: 캣우먼한테 암컷 고양이 선물하면 웃길 줄 알았어.

en: We got Ant-Man a man ant So come on, help us look!
ko: 앤트맨한테는 수컷 개미 선물했잖아. 그러니까 좀 도와줘!

en: Wait, stop! No, stop! This is insane. What's the big deal?
You don't understand. The cat's name is Snugglebucket and it looks like this.
ko: 고양이 이름이 Snugglebucket이고 이렇게 생겼거든. 세상에

en: Oh my god Let's find this cat
It's not under there I got him! I got him!
No, that's Ben. It's okay. Just keep looking.
Why did we ask for the smallest and fastest cat they had?
ko: 괜찮아. 계속 찾아. 왜 우리가 제일 작고 빠른 고양이를 달라고 한 거야?

en: Ben, is it in your desk? No, it's just a stupid dog
John, check the shelf! Checking the shelf!
ko: 세상에 John 선반 확인해! 선반 확인 중!

en: It's not on the shelf Oh my god, I found her
Yay! Thank god!
Little sweetie must have been so scared But the good thing is we found her Wait, where did the cat go?
No! Oh my god! Come on, come on!
Anything under the couch, Mark? Just some crumbs, a coin, and a man Hey guys
Paul Dato? Paul, what are you doing here?
Gosh, I'm sorry. I've been living down there. I'm researching a new movie I'm doing It's about three guys who suck
Come on, man It's about you guys Dude, it's just so crazy, man Like, everything's
ko: 야, 이 사람아. 세 남자라고? 진짜 미친 거 아니야

en: The cat! John! Was I petting it?
I'm checking our stash. I don't see it John, behind you!
I got him! Me again We're never gonna find it!
Guys, this is insane, okay? We're not gonna find it Oh my god No
Oh, it's horrible No, no
My Lego set! You were so hard on me!
ko: 안 돼, 안 돼. 내 레고 세트. 힘들게 만든 건데

en: Hey guys, I found the cat! Yay!
ko: 야 얘들아, 고양이 찾았어! 야호! 좋아, 선물은 잘 받았지

en: Alright, well you're welcome for your gift. We'll see you later That's it? Yeah
Paul, you should probably head out too, man Alright, see ya No, no, no, not, not, don't Goodnight, guys

en: Bye, guys What a crazy adventure we had
ko: 안 돼, 안 돼, 하지 마. 잘 자, 얘들아. 안녕, 얘들아

en: Hey, I'm gonna miss that crazy cat And I'll miss you, dudes Did you just speak?
ko: 정말 미친 모험이었어. 야, 그 미친 고양이가 보고 싶을 거야. 나도 너희가 보고 싶을 거야

en: What?
